label: Get Ads
description: Serves contextual or random advertisements from the in-memory ad catalog.

business.summary: Looks up ads by matching context keys against product categories in the in-memory ad map. If no context keys are provided or no matches are found, two random ads are selected from the full catalog (MAX_ADS_TO_SERVE = 2).
rules: When context keys are provided, ads for all matching categories are aggregated
When no context keys are provided, exactly 2 random ads are served
When context keys yield no matches, falls back to 2 random ads
Supported categories: clothing, accessories, footwear, hair, decor, kitchen
outcomes: An AdResponse containing one or more ads is returned

failure_modes.response: Error logged and propagated to caller
